code-audit.description: Professional code security audit orchestrator covering 55+ vulnerability types across 9 languages. Dispatches specialized audit subagents based on attack surface analysis.

audit-recon.description: Phase 1 reconnaissance agent: tech stack identification, attack surface mapping, module enumeration, authentication chain analysis, and fast exclusion.

audit-d1-injection.description: D1 injection audit agent (sink-driven): SQL/HQL/NoSQL, command injection, SSTI, JNDI, SpEL injection with deep sink chain tracing.

audit-d2d3d9-control.description: D2+D3+D9 control-driven audit agent: authentication chain verification, authorization/IDOR/CRUD consistency, business logic flaws, Mass Assignment, race conditions.

audit-d4-rce.description: D4 RCE/deserialization audit agent (sink-driven): Java/Python/PHP deserialization, gadget chains, script engines, expression injection with sink chain tracing.

audit-d5d6-file-ssrf.description: D5+D6 file operations and SSRF audit agent (sink-driven): file upload/download, path traversal, Zip Slip, SSRF, JDBC URL injection with sink chain tracing.

audit-d7d8d10-config.description: D7+D8+D10 config-driven audit agent: cryptography weaknesses, configuration exposure (Actuator/debug), supply chain CVEs, hardcoded secrets.

audit-evaluation.description: Round evaluation agent: coverage gap assessment, three-question rule, sink fan-out check, cross-round transfer structure generation, adaptive round decisions.

audit-report.description: Report generation agent: severity calibration, attack chain construction, cross-agent deduplication, structured report output with graded sink chain code.
